operations.summary: DEPRECATED - Returns a list of tickets by search parameters
operations.notes:
If the query is successful but no results are found (for example, if there is no ticket for the specified Ticket ID) then the return code will be 200 and the results will be empty.
If the query is successful but there is indexing in progress then the return code will be 206 and the results will hold only the indexed tickets.
If you set 'ids_only' to true, the result includes tickets' ID without any other ticket data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID number of the ticket as shown in SecureChange

parameters.name: assigned_to
parameters.description: The user name of the person assigned to the ticket

parameters.name: sla_status
parameters.description: The SLA status of the ticket

parameters.name: expiration_date_from
parameters.description: Search requests with expiration date from this date

parameters.name: expiration_date_to
parameters.description: Search requests with expiration date until this date

parameters.name: ids_only
parameters.description: Set to true to get only the tickets' ID

responseMessages.message: OK
Partial Content
Access is denied.

Illegal ticket status entered. Permitted values are: IN_PROGRESS, REJECTED, CLOSED, CANCELLED, RESOLVED, WAITING_TO_BE_ASSIGNED, ASSIGNED, WAITING_FOR_MORE_INFO, DONE, INVALID, PENDING, PENDING_LICENSE
Illegal ticket SLA status entered. Permitted values are: NA, OK, WARNING, ALERT, ESCALATION
Illegal ticket priority entered. Permitted values are: LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, CRITICAL
Illegal ticket expiration date entered. Permitted date format is: ddMMyyyy (ex. 20112001)
Cannot find specified domain <DOMAIN_NAME>

operations.summary: DEPRECATED - Returns a list of tickets by free-text query
operations.notes:
Square brackets ('[' and ']') are not supported for free text searches using an API request. Replace '[' with '%5B' and ']' with '%5D'.
Incorrect:
parameter=createdate:[20080120 TO 20090120]
Correct:
parameter=createdate:%5B20080120%20TO%2020090120%5D

parameters.name: parameter
parameters.description: Free text search parameter (Search syntax details)

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Tickets list max length (max value is 1000)

parameters.name: ids_only
parameters.description: Set to true to get only the tickets' ID

responseMessages.message: OK
Partial Content
Can not fetch more than 1000 tickets in 1 time
Access is denied.
Illegal ticket status entered. Permitted values are: IN_PROGRESS, REJECTED, CLOSED, CANCELLED, RESOLVED
Illegal ticket SLA status entered. Permitted values are: NA, OK, WARNING, ALERT, ESCALATION
Illegal ticket priority entered. Permitted values are: LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, CRITICAL
Illegal count value entered. Max value is 1000
Illegal ticket expiration date entered. Permitted date format is: ddMMyyyy (ex. 20112001)
No entity found for query

operations.summary: Returns a list of tickets for a given group
operations.notes:
If the search is successful but no results are found (for example, If no tickets found for the group), the return code will be 200 and the results will be empty.
If the indexing is in progress, then the return code will be 206 and the results will contain only the indexed tickets.
If you set 'count' to 0, all tickets found will be returned, which may lead to performance issues.
If you set 'ids_only' to true, the result includes tickets' ID without any other ticket data.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: A limit of the number of tickets to be returned - default value is 1000

parameters.name: ids_only
parameters.description: Set to true to get only the tickets' ID

responseMessages.message: OK
Partial content due to indexing in progress
Group ID was not found.
User has no permissions to view group's tickets

operations.summary: Returns a list of tickets by search parameters
operations.notes:
If the query is successful but no results are found (for example, if there is no ticket for the specified Ticket ID) then the return code will be 200 and the results will be empty.
If the query is successful but there is indexing in progress then the return code will be 206 and the results will hold only the indexed tickets.
If you set 'ids_only' to true, the result includes tickets' ID without any other ticket data.
If you set 'count' to 0, all tickets found will be returned, which may lead to performance issues.

This API is different version of /securechange/tickets/search API.
The output format in this version has changed compared to previous version.
Results containing just one element will now be returned as a single element array rather than an object.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID number of the ticket as shown in SecureChange

parameters.name: assigned_to
parameters.description: The user name of the person assigned to the ticket

parameters.name: task_status
parameters.allowableValues: WAITING_TO_BE_ASSIGNED, ASSIGNED, WAITING_FOR_MORE_INFO, DONE, INVALID, PENDING, PENDING_LICENSE

parameters.name: sla_status
parameters.description: The SLA status of the ticket

parameters.name: sla_outcome
parameters.description: The SLA outcome of the ticket

parameters.name: sla_tracking_state
parameters.description: The SLA Tracking State of the ticket

parameters.name: expiration_date_from
parameters.description: Search requests with expiration date from this date

parameters.name: expiration_date_to
parameters.description: Search requests with expiration date until this date

parameters.name: ids_only
parameters.description: Set to true to get only the tickets' ID

responseMessages.message: OK
Partial Content
Access is denied.
Illegal ticket status entered. Permitted values are: IN_PROGRESS, REJECTED, CLOSED, CANCELLED, RESOLVED
Illegal task status entered. Permitted values are: WAITING_TO_BE_ASSIGNED, ASSIGNED, WAITING_FOR_MORE_INFO, DONE, INVALID, PENDING, PENDING_LICENSE
Illegal ticket SLA status entered. Permitted values are: NA, OK, WARNING, ALERT, ESCALATION
Illegal ticket SLA outcome entered. Permitted values are: NA, UNKNOWN, MET, OVERDUE
Illegal ticket SLA tracking state  entered. Permitted value is: PAUSED
Illegal ticket priority entered. Permitted values are: Critical, High, Normal, Low
Illegal ticket expiration date entered. Permitted date format is: ddMMyyyy (ex. 20112001)
Cannot find specified domain <DOMAIN_NAME>

operations.summary: Returns a list of tickets by query id for user
operations.notes:
If the query is successful but no results are found (for example, if there is no ticket for the specified Ticket ID) then the return code will be 200 and the results will be empty.
If the query is successful but indexing is in progress then the return code will be 206 and the results will contain only the indexed tickets.
If you set 'count' to 0, all tickets found will be returned, which may lead to performance issues.
If you set 'ids_only' to true, the result includes tickets' ID without any other ticket data.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: A limit of the number of tickets to be returned - default value is 1000

parameters.name: ids_only
parameters.description: Set to true to get only the tickets' ID
